notes: Audio bundled back into the main game .pck — fixes the silent-game regression from v0.3.1. Asset pack architecture abandoned: updates are larger (~90 MB) but reliable. No more manual workarounds, no more 'where did my music go'. Same game features as 0.3.1 — three modes (ARENA / CAPTURE THE PULSE / PAINT WAR), bot races for the orb in CAPTURE, first-to-30 ends the match, LV/XP shown in top bar + sidebar, PULSE/SURGE in CURRENCIES section with tooltips.
launcher_notes: Rename-first self-update — fixes the infinite-update loop on Windows (Defender was blocking the old del+copy flow, and the bat retry counter never incremented). Failed swaps now auto-restore from backup. CLASSES roster panel removed from left side.
